title: MUSIC VIDEO RENDER B — Eva solo slow-mo wonder at the magic bottle
reuseAssetNote: ONE 10s slow-mo render, paired with Suno song 'Magic Bottle Whisper.mp3' via loopVideoWithSong.mjs to fill the 60s music block.
prompt: Wide slow-motion music-video shot — soft pastel-teal and pink gradient backdrop, glowing soap-bubbles and floating pollen motes drifting slowly through the frame. The @magic-bottle floats centered slightly to the LEFT of frame, suspended in mid-air with gentle aqua-blue glow, the rolled paper note visible inside, faint magical sparkles around it. NO scene clutter, NO real beach, NO real ocean. @Eva alone in the FOREGROUND-CENTER-RIGHT, in slow-motion: arms slowly raised in wonder, head tilted back to look up at the floating bottle, eyes huge and shining. Eva slowly turns in place, her hair drifting in slow-motion as if underwater. Eva extends a single hand slowly toward the bottle, palm open in greeting. The bottle gently bobs forward to meet her hand. A single bubble pops softly on her fingertip. Eva smiles softly, eyes huge with awe. The shot is in heavy slow-motion throughout — every gesture takes 2-3x normal time. Movements are LOOPABLE — clean cycle: stand → arms up → turn → reach → bottle responds → smile → return to start. Camera locked, head-on, slow gentle dolly-in. Eva does NOT speak, does NOT sing, does NOT lip-sync — only quiet wonder, occasionally smiling. No audible speech, no music — silent slow-mo render.
